summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Audit Trail and Employment Applications features. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.

issues: Store name shows 'Loading...' briefly for newly converted employees - minor UX issue

passed_tests: GET /api/stock-audit-trail - returns audit entries with filters
Stock Audit Trail page navigation and display
Stock Audit Trail filters (store, movement type, date range)
Stock Audit Trail Summary & Analytics tab
Employees page with Employees and Applications tabs
New Application button opens Employment Application Form
Employment Application Form 6 tabs (Personal, Position, Free Will, Documents, Consent, Declaration)
Application status flow: Pending Review -> Under Review -> Approved
critical_code_review_comments: Stock Audit Trail properly tracks all stock movements with who/when/quantities
Employment Application Form has all 6 required tabs: Personal, Position, Free Will (7 days), Documents, Consent, Declaration
Application status flow works correctly: pending_review -> under_review -> approved -> converted_to_employee
Convert to employee creates proper employee record with all application data
All data-testid attributes present for testing (employees-page, new-application-btn, stock-audit-trail-page)
seed_data_creation: Test applications and employees created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Audit Trail and Employment Applications features fully tested. Stock Audit Trail shows movement history with filters and Summary & Analytics tab. Employment Application Form has 6 tabs (Personal, Position, Free Will 7-day period, Documents with upload, Parent/Guardian Consent for minors, Declaration). Application workflow: create -> pending_review -> under_review -> approved -> convert_to_employee. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_stock_audit_employment.py with 17 tests.

ui_features: 6-tab form (Personal, Position, Free Will, Documents, Consent, Declaration)
Status update buttons (Start Review, Approve, Reject)
